channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - Current
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status Current from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Amphetamine Aspartate Monohydrate, Amphetamine Sulfate, Dextroamphetamine Saccharate, Dextroamphetamine Sulfate Tablet (0406-8884-01)
